name: hospitality shift managers processing 5–15 compliance reports/month tool
description: For hospitality shift managers processing 5–15 compliance reports/month, manual tracking causes late submissions. We automate compliance report filing instead of manual tracking and filing of compliance reports.

problem_solved: Difficulty in compiling and filing compliance reports accurately and on time.
